{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"7","subject":"Task 10: project_detail PPTX layout + regen templates","description":"Extend `create_pptx_templates.py` (at repo root) to add a new `project_detail` layout that can hold 1 title + 1 summary text + 2-3 image placeholders. Then regenerate all 3 PPTX templates in `src-tauri/templates/pptx/` (mono/professional/vibrant).

**Current state:** LAYOUT_MAP in `src-tauri/src/services/export_pptx_renderer.rs` has indices 0-6. Add index 7 = project_detail.

**Layout requirements:**
- Slide title (top, larger font)
- Project summary (left column, ~40% width)
- Image area (right column or bottom row) with 2-3 image placeholders (use `ph type="pic"` in PPTX XML)
- Match the color/font palette of each master (mono/professional/vibrant)

**Must read before starting:**
- `docs/llm/006-project-media-assets.plan.md` Task 10 section
- `create_pptx_templates.py` — current layout build code (uses lxml to edit slideLayout XML)
- `src-tauri/src/services/export_pptx_renderer.rs` LAYOUT_MAP constant
- Existing generated templates for reference

**Execution:**
1. Modify the Python script
2. Run `uv run python create_pptx_templates.py` (NEVER bare python/python3)
3. Verify the 3 .pptx files updated (file size/timestamp)
4. Spot-check by unzipping one: `unzip -l src-tauri/templates/pptx/professional.pptx | grep slideLayout` — should show one more layout
5. Commit: `feat(pptx): add project_detail layout to PPTX templates`

**Independent task — no blockers, no waiting.**
**Blocks:** Task 11

**Team context:** You are `python-agent` on team `media-006`. This is your only task; after completion report and go idle.","assignedBy":"team-lead","timestamp":"2026-04-10T09:50:35.319Z"}
